no: Spontaneous Casting by Bubb. PnP-style spontaneous casting for divine casters. Only 1 commit (March 2019), abandoned. Not extracted. cdtweaks cn:6030 provides similar functionality and is more maintained. Magic Fang (cn:1) is a unique spell not found elsewhere.

conflicts.reason: Both add spontaneous casting for Clerics. Spontaneous Casting covers Clerics AND Druids; cdtweaks #6030 covers Clerics only

spells: Priests can spontaneously cast Cure spells
Priests can spontaneously cast Cure spells
Priests can spontaneously cast Cure spells
Priests can spontaneously cast Cure spells

new: Enhances animal companion attacks with magic.

sum: Adds PnP-style spontaneous casting for divine casters, allowing clerics and druids to convert memorized spells into cure/inflict spells.

co.no: PnP-style spontaneous casting for Clerics (convert memorized spells to Cure/Cause Wounds) and Druids (convert to Summon Nature's Ally). Overlaps with cdtweaks cn:6030 (Luke's version). Only 1 commit (March 2019), effectively abandoned. By Bubb (EEex author). Not extracted.
Adds Magic Fang druid spell — enhances animal companion/summoned animal attacks with magical bonus. Standalone spell addition. Adds 1 priest IDS slot.
